hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "Claude needs your attention" with title "BabySafety"'
echo 'Reminder: Always activate venv first (source venv/bin/activate). Run babysafety compile after YAML changes. Run pytest after code changes.'

FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q 'data/compiled/'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","reason":"Never edit compiled files directly. Use babysafety compile."}}'; exit 2; fi
